entries.name: transfer-prune
entries.purpose: Daily 03:30 UTC — dispatch PruneXferArtifactsJob. Four passes: expired artifact files, xfer_jobs rows past retention tier, stale queued/running jobs (>24h no progress → auto-cancel), mapping profiles past soft-delete grace.

entries.name: transfer-stalled-sweep
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes — cheap sweep just for stalled queued/running jobs. Keeps user-facing state fresh so a crashed worker doesn't leave 'running' rows visible for up to 24h.

entries.name: transfer-registry-refresh
entries.purpose: Hourly — rebuild the EntityRegistry cache from disk. Guards against attribute cache drift during rolling deploys. Cheap: reflection over ~50 model classes.
